title: T-008 — API: supplier CRUD + supplier_products assignment
prompt:
Implement supplier CRUD API per PRD §6.1 + FR-PLAN-001/002. Endpoints:
- GET /api/planning/suppliers (list, filter by is_active)
- GET /api/planning/suppliers/:id
- POST /api/planning/suppliers (Zod validate; country ISO 3166-1, currency ISO 4217, email regex, phone E.164 optional)
- PUT /api/planning/suppliers/:id
- DELETE /api/planning/suppliers/:id (soft delete: is_active=false)
- POST /api/planning/suppliers/:id/products (assign product with is_default flag, enforce max-1-default per product via T-001 partial-unique index)

Next.js Server Actions or route handlers acceptable; use Drizzle queries with tenant_id RLS. Validation via Zod schemas in `src/lib/validators/supplier.ts`.

RED test: `src/app/api/planning/suppliers/__tests__/route.test.ts` covers V-PLAN-PO-001 (unique code per tenant), V-PLAN-PO-002 (max 1 default per product), soft-delete preserves history.

pipeline_inputs.description: RESTful CRUD for suppliers + supplier_products assignment with default enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use Next.js App Router route handlers under `src/app/api/planning/suppliers/`. Tenant scoping via `getTenantId()` helper that reads from session JWT and sets app.tenant_id Postgres GUC. Zod validators export both `supplierCreateSchema` and `supplierUpdateSchema`. is_default conflict returns 409 with body { code: 'V-PLAN-PO-002', existing_default_supplier_id }. Soft-delete sets is_active=false; hard-delete forbidden (return 405).
acceptance_criteria: Given two suppliers in same tenant with code='ACME', when second POST is attempted, then HTTP 409 is returned.
Given supplier_products row with is_default=true exists for product P, when another assignment with is_default=true is POSTed for same product, then HTTP 409 with code 'V-PLAN-PO-002'.
Given DELETE /api/planning/suppliers/:id is called, when fetched again, then row remains with is_active=false (soft delete).
Given `pnpm vitest run src/app/api/planning/suppliers/__tests__/route.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for V-PLAN-PO-001/002 + soft-delete semantics.
risk_red_lines: Do not hard-delete supplier rows — history retention required.
Do not skip Zod validation on the API boundary.
Do not allow cross-tenant reads — RLS must be active for every request.
